news.headline: Musk keeps Tesla-SpaceX merger speculation alive, cites growing overlap
news.summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Wednesday left the door open to the EV maker merging with his other trillion-dollar-plus-valued firm SpaceX, declining to ‌dismiss the possibility and citing growing overlap between the companies.

news.headline: Apple Is Reportedly Launching a Device-Leasing Program With Klarna on July 28. Here's What It Means for iPhone Revenue.
news.summary: Leasing could change how the iPhone maker's biggest revenue line behaves.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $705.35 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $747.41 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bearish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $705.35 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NFLX PUT — enter $3.26–$3.60, target $5.14+, stop $2.06.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -0.51% and SPY -0.12%. Composite sentiment -23 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by sector rotation, market breadth (a/d), qqq / mega-cap tech. VIX at 15.15 (+0.29%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Industrials (+1.88%) is leading while Financials (-2.33%) lags. Premarket strength in AVGO, NVDA; weakness in PLTR, COIN. The desk's highest-conviction setup is NFLX (7.1/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
